dict.string: FastyDiscount uses your background location to alert you the moment you walk past a store with one of your saved discounts — even when the app is closed. Your location is never stored or shared.
FastyDiscount uses your location to show your saved discount vouchers on the map and help you find the nearest stores where they can be redeemed.
FastyDiscount uses the camera to scan barcodes and QR codes on discount vouchers.
FastyDiscount accesses your photo library to import images of discount vouchers.
